site.title: Oryxen Labs
site.tagline: Building mobile apps, automation tools, and open-source digital products — quietly and precisely.
site.description: Oryxen Labs builds mobile apps, automation tools & open-source software. Belgium-based dev studio shipping quality digital products globally.

hero.subtitle: Oryxen Labs ships mobile apps, automation tools, and open-source software — crafted with precision, designed to last.

about.title: A small studio.
about.subtitle: We design and build mobile apps, automation tools, and digital products — quietly and precisely, with a focus on long-term quality.

cards.title: Mobile Apps
cards.description: Native-quality mobile apps built for real users — intuitive, reliable, and designed to stand out in crowded app stores.

cards.title: Automation Tools
cards.description: Smart scripts and tools that eliminate repetitive work — from IT automation to workflow integrations and API connectors.

cards.title: Open Source
cards.description: We believe in giving back. Every major project we build feeds back into the open-source community with clean, documented code.
